step_rationale: Inflammasome activation drives atherosclerotic inflammation and atheroinflammatory cytokine release.
mechanism: NLRP3 inflammasome activation in atherosclerotic plaques and post-MI inflammation generates IL-1β and IL-18, amplifying plaque destabilization and injury response.
